column1: # block-schemas.tsv — required mechanical fields per ## Block (CONVENTIONS.md §4).
# Columns are separated by the FIRST whitespace run; BlockName has no spaces,
# field keys may contain spaces (e.g. "Tier applied"). Keep in sync with CONVENTIONS.md §4.
# A field key may carry an inline VALUE constraint: Field=nonblank or Field=enum:A|B|C
# (enum options are |-separated; the comma stays the field separator). block-lint.sh
# checks presence for every field and the value rule for any constrained field.
